label: External retrieval & ranking

node.label: External retrieval & ranking
node.definition: Relevant records, documents, examples, or tools are selected from an external collection.
node.why_it_matters: The role of External retrieval & ranking is to connect Databases & information retrieval, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Episodic memory, Sparse lexical retrieval, Dense vector retrieval.
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Databases & information retrieval, Embeddings & distributed representations.

dependencies.rationale: External retrieval & ranking uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Margin, ranking & metric objectives as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Relevant records, documents, examples, or tools are selected from an external collection.

The role of External retrieval & ranking is to connect Databases & information retrieval, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Episodic memory, Sparse lexical retrieval, Dense vector retrieval.

Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Databases & information retrieval, Embeddings & distributed representations.
External retrieval & ranking uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External retrieval & ranking uses Margin, ranking & metric objectives as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
